texto: The poorest man may in his cottage bid defiance to all the force of the crown. It may be frail - its roof may shake - the wind may blow through it - the storm may enter - the rain may enter - but the King of England cannot enter! - all his force dares not cross the threshhold of the ruined tenement!
explicacao: Citação de William Pitt the Elder sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The poorest man may in his cottage bid defiance to all the force of the crown. It may be frail - …” articula sucesso, government, rule em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e rule.
